esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-tomcat.otel-*
| WHERE Catalina_ThreadPool_connectionCount IS NOT NULL
    AND Catalina_ThreadPool_maxConnections IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    connections = MAX(Catalina_ThreadPool_connectionCount),
    max_connections = MAX(Catalina_ThreadPool_maxConnections)
  BY host.name, attributes.name
| WHERE max_connections > 0
| EVAL connection_pct = ROUND(connections / max_connections * 100.0, 2)
// Connection saturation threshold — when keep-alive connections accumulate
// they can starve new connections; adjust based on connector capacity planning
| WHERE connection_pct > 80.0
| SORT connection_pct DESC
